hero.description: How modern creators build smarter content: a fully AI-driven hands-on workshop by Brand Republic.

speaker.name: Syed Muneeb Ali
speaker.description: A creative strategist at the intersection of design, video, and AI. Muneeb leads creative production at Brand Republic - building workflows that merge visual craft with intelligent automation to help brands tell better stories, faster.

creativeIntelligence.description: A practical system you'll apply in every module from first idea to final optimized asset.

workshopAgenda.subtitle: 09 modules, fully AI-driven each builds directly on the last.

items.title: SETTING THE STAGE
items.description: AI-narrated welcome + live warm-up exercise with a generated creative brief

items.title: MODERN CREATIVE REALITY
items.description: The creator economy shift - why design + video + AI is now one skill

items.title: THE CREATIVE INTELLIGENCE FRAMEWORK
items.description: Build a full content plan from a single prompt using the 6-step system

items.title: CORE DESIGN PRINCIPLES
items.description: Hierarchy, spacing, contrast - applied live with AI-generated examples

items.title: SOCIAL MEDIA CAMPAIGN DESIGN
items.description: One brief to posts, stories, reels adapted per platform with AI tools

items.title: VIDEO PRODUCTION & MOTION
items.description: Text-to-video with Higgsfield + live AI editing session

items.title: AI IN CREATIVE WORKFLOWS
items.description: Full pipeline demo: concept to design to video to caption, live

items.title: LIVE BUILD
items.description: Audience gives a prompt - Muneeb builds a finished piece on screen in real time

items.title: Q&A + AI CAREER PATHWAYS
items.description: Leave with a personalized AI upskilling roadmap for your creative goals

aiToolStack.subtitle: No prior experience needed everything is taught from scratch.

results.text: A short video created from a text prompt
A multi-format social campaign you built
Career positioning in the AI-creative space

ctaFooter.description: Join creators, designers, and strategists leveling up their workflow with AI. Limited seats available.
